variants.title: No Valid Attachments Found
variants.message: We received your email but could not find any PDF or DOCX files attached. Please re-send your email with at least one Job Description and one Resume attached as PDF or DOCX files.

variants.title: More Documents Needed
variants.message: Our screener needs at least two documents — one Job Description and one Resume — to run a fitment analysis. Please re-send your email with both files attached.

variants.title: AI Analysis Failed
variants.message: We were unable to complete the AI-powered analysis for your documents. This may be a temporary issue. Please try again in a few minutes. If the problem continues, check that your files are not password-protected or corrupted.

variants.title: Service Temporarily Unavailable
variants.message: We encountered a configuration issue on our end. Our team has been notified automatically. Please try again later.

variants.title: Processing Timed Out
variants.message: Your request took longer than expected and could not be completed. This sometimes happens with very large documents. Please try again with smaller files or fewer attachments at a time.

variants.subject_suffix: Too Many or Too Large Attachments
variants.title: Attachments Too Large to Process Together
variants.message: The total size of your attached documents exceeds our processing limit. Please try again with fewer attachments per email, or split your request into multiple emails (e.g. one JD with one or two resumes at a time).

variants.title: Document Too Large to Process
variants.message: One or more of your documents exceeded our processing capacity. Please try again with smaller or fewer files.

default.title: An Unexpected Error Occurred
default.message: We received your request but ran into an unexpected problem during processing. Please try again. If the issue persists, ensure your attachments are valid PDF or DOCX files and are not password-protected or corrupted.
